title: stelis baudoensis
intro: Stelis baudoensis, also known as the Baudo Stelis, is a type of orchid native to Colombia and Ecuador. It is a terrestrial orchid with medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis baudoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being incorporated into ointments and salves for topical application.
